exceptions.rationale: The latest stable gray-matter release still vendors js-yaml 3.14.2, so the docs-site audit gate needs a temporary pinned exception until upstream ships a fixed production dependency chain.
exceptions.upgrade_trigger: Remove this exception as soon as gray-matter ships a stable release that no longer vendors vulnerable js-yaml and npm audit --omit=dev stops reporting GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68 for docs-site production dependencies.
